raw.message: Experience the power of robot guns!

hook.summary: High-intensity mech combat with a 'Double Kill' achievement.
hook.visual_action: A blue battle mech fires rockets at enemy units on a road, triggering explosions and a 'Double Kill' notification.

scene_flow: Mech engages multiple enemies on an industrial road and achieves a double kill.
Continuous rocket fire at targets while the mech advances through the environment.
Mech jumps into the air and unleashes a massive barrage of missiles.
Transition to a black end-card with 'PLAY GAME!' text and sparks.
audience_proxy: Competitive male gamers interested in high-octane mech combat and tactical shooters.
